name: Orlandi Valuta
description_short: Orlandi Valuta is an international money transfer service specializing in US-to-Mexico transfers with 20 years of experience and an established agent network across multiple countries.
description_long:
Orlandi Valuta has operated as an international money transfer provider for 20 years, building a network of agent locations to facilitate cross-border financial services. The company positions itself as a specialist in transfers from the United States to Mexico, leveraging decades of experience in the remittance corridor between these two countries. Their extended operational history suggests established relationships and familiarity with US-Mexico transfer infrastructure and regulations.

The company offers international money transfer services with a primary focus on USD transfers from the United States. According to their website, they serve multiple destination countries including Mexico, Colombia, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Haiti, and Honduras. This indicates they have expanded beyond their Mexico specialization to provide broader Latin American coverage, though Mexico remains their primary market focus.

Orlandi Valuta distinguishes itself through its 20-year track record and established agent network across multiple countries. This operational longevity in the remittance space suggests reliability and familiarity with cross-border transfer processes, compliance requirements, and customer needs in the US-Latin America corridor. The multi-country agent presence provides customers with localized pickup and payout options rather than relying solely on direct banking transfers.

As an international money transfer service, Orlandi Valuta operates in a competitive market with numerous established players. Consumers should compare their exchange rates, fees, transfer speeds, and agent location convenience against competitors. The website provides limited details about specific fees, exchange rate markups, or service speeds, requiring potential customers to contact the company directly for detailed pricing and timing information.
address: 801 N Pulaski Rd 111th &, S Michigan Ave Ce, Chicago, IL 60651

company_info.headquarters: 801 N Pulaski Rd 111th &, S Michigan Ave Ce, Chicago, IL 60651

pros: 20 years of operational experience in international money transfers
Established agent network across multiple countries for local pickup options
Specializes in US-to-Mexico transfers, the largest remittance corridor from the US
Serves 9 destination countries including major remittance destinations
Accepts USD transfers from the United States
Physical agent locations provide alternatives to bank transfer-only services
cons: Website provides no information on exchange rates, fees, or transfer costs for comparison
No details on transfer speed or delivery timeframes disclosed
Limited online presence and details compared to larger money transfer competitors
No information on minimum or maximum transfer amounts
No customer service contact information or support hours visible on provided content
best_for: US-based senders regularly transferring money to Mexico
Customers in Latin American communities preferring agent-based pickups over bank transfers
Consumers seeking alternatives to digital-only money transfer platforms
diagnosis: Orlandi Valuta is best for customers in the US sending remittances to Mexico or other Latin American countries who prefer using established agent networks for local fund pickup rather than direct bank transfers. The main caveat is that the website lacks essential pricing, speed, and fee information, requiring direct contact with the company to evaluate competitiveness against other money transfer providers.
services: International money transfers from United States to Mexico
